あなたの想いを運ぶ物それがVESSELなのです。

body: A rare departure from Vermeer's usual domestic realism, this complex allegorical work defends the Catholic faith in a Protestant-dominated society. It is dense with symbolism, from the crushed snake to the glass globe, showcasing the artist's intellectual depth. It provides a unique window into the religious tensions and private beliefs of the era.
title: Allegory of the Catholic Faith, Johannes Vermeer
